The U.S. Preventive Services Task Force is a scientifically independent panel of experts in primary care and prevention that systematically reviews the evidence of effectiveness and develops recommendations for clinical preventive services. These reviews are published as U.S. Preventive Services Task Force recommendations on the Task Force Web site and in a peer-reviewed journal.
Latest Final Recommendations 
Intimate Partner Violence and Caregiver Abuse of Older or Vulnerable Adults: Screening 
Jun 2025
